steps.title: Identify the study's core finding
steps.content: The notes center on one key relationship: as wind conditions worsened, auks' landing success declined. An effective summary must capture this cause-and-effect pattern, not merely describe the study's scope.

steps.title: Match the finding to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly states: “as wind conditions intensified, the birds' success rate decreased.” The other choices either omit the finding (A), report only what researchers aimed to investigate (B), or cite a number without context (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
